name: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez
subject: A critical special election is happening this weekend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20210423-2023-header&t=1&akid=2023%2E2526796%2EtVg_t-)
I'm proud to endorse Karen Carter Peterson for Congress in tomorrow’s special election runoff in Louisiana's 2nd District.
Senator Peterson is an inspiring, progressive leader who would help pave the way to achieve criminal justice reform, Medicare for All, a Green New Deal, and much more. But right now, her campaign needs critical resources in their final hours before Election Day. She needs our help:
[Will you make a time-sensitive contribution of $3 to Karen's campaign for Congress? Your donation will go a long way in turning out voters for this important race.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/8610?refcode=em20210423-2023&t=20&akid=2023%2E2526796%2EtVg_t-)
**[Contribute $3](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/8610?refcode=em20210423-2023&t=21&akid=2023%2E2526796%2EtVg_t-)**
We need leaders in Congress who have the political courage to fight for what's right when it comes improving the lives of working-class families.
Karen is one of those leaders. She has spent her career fighting for working families in her community in the State House and Senate. She helped pass a Medicaid expansion bill that insured hundreds of thousands of Louisianans, and she did it despite stiff opposition from the Republican majority in her state.
Karen is used to the tough fights. And she's a bold, unapologetic progressive. I have no doubt she will join our shared effort to make our country work better for all of us — not just the wealthy and well-connected.
Like all candidates I've endorsed, Sen. Peterson isn’t accepting a penny from corporate PACs, so her campaign is depending on grassroots support in the homestretch. Karen is in a strong position to win this race, but we can’t leave anything to chance.
[Time is running out. Please make a donation — of $3 or whatever you can — to help power Karen Carter Peterson to victory tomorrow.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/8610?refcode=em20210423-2023&t=22&akid=2023%2E2526796%2EtVg_t-)
Pa’lante,
Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ocasio-campaign?refcode=em20210423-2023-footer&t=23&refcode2=2023_2526796_tVg_t-&akid=2023%2E2526796%2EtVg_t-)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=24&akid=2023%2E2526796%2EtVg_t-) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=25&akid=2023%2E2526796%2EtVg_t-) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=26&akid=2023%2E2526796%2EtVg_t-)
Email us: [us@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: us@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=27&akid=2023%2E2526796%2EtVg_t-)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=28&akid=2023%2E2526796%2EtVg_t-)

Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress

name: Rep. Andy Biggs
subject: CONFIRMED: Yemeni Terrorists Exploit Biden Border
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BIGGS FOR CONGRESS**
body:
[](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/57231109:63menFuNe:m:1:3103520637:C5CEB01DA122349D67954894B5E8B6D3:r "Headline") Peter, Terrorists are coming to our Southern Border, and Joe Biden doesn't much care--but you know it's bad when even the liberal media can't ignore this story. Border Patrol agents apprehended two terrorists from Yemen trying to cross from Mexico into our country and **their names are on our nation 's "no fly" list--barring them entry as a national security threat.** And what is Joe Biden's response to this news--send in the military? No, he put **_Kamala Harris_** in charge of "managing" the crisis; the same woman who **_compared ICE agents to the KKK_**. How can we have a "border czar" who refuses to enforce our immigration laws? **[If you think Kamala Harris managing a border crisis is a national embarrassment, you're the kind of conservative who thinks like I do, and I would love to have you on my team as I stand up against the radical left and fight to secure our borders.](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/57231109:63menFuNe:m:1:3103520637:C5CEB01DA122349D67954894B5E8B6D3:r "If you think Kamala Harris managing a border crisis is a national
embarrassment, you’re the kind of conservative who thinks like I do, and I would love to have you on my team as I stand up against the radical
left and fight to secure our borders.")** Our brave Border Patrol agents--saddled with securing our border from drug cartels and sex traffickers as Washington wants to defund law enforcement nationwide--now must confront terrorists seeking ways to exploit the vulnerabilities in our national security. **These men from Yemen are almost certainly not alone.** Terrorists are coming in; good paying jobs are going out, and there's no way on God's Earth Kamala Harris will **__ever__** fix the problem. Harris has been MIA on the border crisis since Biden appointed her and their White House is doing all it can to keep the media and Congress from seeing the mess they've made. As a Congressman from the border state of Arizona, I demand we return to Trump-era Border Security policies. I know you feel the same, which is why I'm fighting day and night to make that happen. **[That's why your donation of $35, $100 or $250 will help me ensure leaders in Washington are forced to take the Biden Border Crisis seriously and pass my bills to secure our nation's porous Southern Border.](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/57231110:63menFuNe:m:1:3103520637:C5CEB01DA122349D67954894B5E8B6D3:r "That’s why your donation of $35, $100 or $250 will help me
ensure leaders in Washington are forced to take the Biden Border Crisis seriously and pass my bills to secure our nation’s porous Southern
Border.")** I'm leading the fight with clear legislation to close border loopholes that allow terrorists to infiltrate our sovereign borders and prevent petty lawbreakers from staying here indefinitely. [](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/57231109:63menFuNe:m:1:3103520637:C5CEB01DA122349D67954894B5E8B6D3:r "Video") My principled leadership on the immigration issue leaves me an exposed target of Democrats and their woke, progressive donors. You can bet I will continue to be a thorn in the side of Democrats in Washington until we finally secure our borders. **[But my momentum on tough border legislation leaves me relying on patriots like you to help me keep up the fight. Will you support me with your donation of $35, $50, $100 or even $500 TODAY?](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/57231111:63menFuNe:m:1:3103520637:C5CEB01DA122349D67954894B5E8B6D3:r "But my momentum on tough border legislation leaves me relying on
patriots like you to help me keep up the fight. Will you support me with your donation of $35, $50, $100 or even $500 TODAY?")** Since I'm out in front on the border issue, every contribution you send our way reinforces our message to the liberal establishment in Washington: fix the border now, no matter the excuse. With your help, I promise to never back down. Yours in Service to Our Great Land,
[](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/57231109:63menFuNe:m:1:3103520637:C5CEB01DA122349D67954894B5E8B6D3:r "Andy Biggs")
Rep. Andy Biggs (AZ-5)
---
| **PAID FOR BY BIGGS FOR CONGRESS**

name: Mark, Taylor, Me (3)
subject: Taylor asked me to check in on you, friend. Leadership was concerned
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
You are receiving this email because our records indicate you are a supporter of the Republican Party. You can [unsubscribe](http://ct4.americasnewsletter.com/t/9467473/224717773/2036/1/?90482085=aHR0cDovL2N0NC5hbWVyaWNhc25ld3NsZXR0ZXIuY29tL3U%2faWQ9MjI0NzE3NzczLjhkZjc4NzE1ODQwOGE3NzA4OTMwYWNmMTRjZjJjYTljJm49VCZsPWEtbWFzdGVybGlzdF9yaWdodC1wYXRoXzEwMTQ5OSZvPTk0Njc0NzM%3d&x=bf62779d) at any time.

Hey Fellow Conservative,

Taylor was going through the House Victory Coalition supporter list and noticed your name was missing. (You can read her email below.) Can we count on you to update your status to ACTIVE?

****HOUSE VICTORY COALITION****

Invite for [**dpwillis67@gmail.com**](http://ct4.americasnewsletter.com/t/9467473/224717773/198748/2/?ff2f3d13=cnAuMTAxNDk5&ff2f3d13=cnAuMTAxNDk5&x=48ef48ef)
Membership Tier: Platinum
Patriot ID: **MISSING**
Invite Expires: 11:59 PM TONIGHT

****[**ACTIVATE STATUS**](http://ct4.americasnewsletter.com/t/9467473/224717773/198748/3/?ff2f3d13=cnAuMTAxNDk5&ff2f3d13=cnAuMTAxNDk5&x=dc309c35)**** ********
---

They're finalizing names for PLATINUM patriots tonight and we wanted to make sure you had this last chance to pledge your support.

[**Can we count on you to join us?**](http://ct4.americasnewsletter.com/t/9467473/224717773/198748/4/?ff2f3d13=cnAuMTAxNDk5&ff2f3d13=cnAuMTAxNDk5&x=68d109fe)

Thanks,

Mark, House GOP HQ

\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: **Taylor** , House GOP HQ
Date: Wed, Apr 21, 2021 at 12:27 PM
Subject: Have you heard from our Fellow Conservative?
To: **Mark** , House GOP HQ

Hey Mark,

It's nearly the end of April, and I haven't heard from our Fellow Conservative about their House Victory Coalition member status.

[**We're asking only the most valued members of our team to join.**](http://ct4.americasnewsletter.com/t/9467473/224717773/198748/5/?ff2f3d13=cnAuMTAxNDk5&ff2f3d13=cnAuMTAxNDk5&x=bdbca9d9)

They're a top-tier patriot and a dedicated conservative... I thought they'd be all over this, **especially because our ability to take back the House and defend Trump's legacy hinges on the support of people like them.** But, as I said, their name was missing from the list.

We're just FIVE SEATS away from taking back the House and firing Pelosi. That's the SMALLEST the majority has been in decades. If we miss this shot to restore an America First agenda... we might not get another like it again!

We're finalizing the list of PLATINUM patriots at midnight, so if they want to join this exclusive coalition of dedicated conservatives, they have to at fast.

[_**There's not much time left. Our Fellow Conservative has only until 11:59 PM tonight to join the ranks of PLATINUM patriots. Would you mind reaching out to remind them?**_](http://ct4.americasnewsletter.com/t/9467473/224717773/198748/6/?ff2f3d13=cnAuMTAxNDk5&ff2f3d13=cnAuMTAxNDk5&x=e4ad336b)

Thanks,

Taylor, House GOP HQ

Will you make a contribution today? _If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately_ _ _ [**Refundable $50**](https://act.myngp.com/el/snt8WKA73CrkbkCfUB_iVykFz0kkjf_frAdBC-1bZi0=/DSa-n8cV1AIC7bStVyb44EpBps5SOIa5GrUPZwONy70=?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=042421) [**Refundable $100**](https://act.myngp.com/el/snt8WKA73CrkbkCfUB_iVykFz0kkjf_frAdBC-1bZi0=/DSa-n8cV1AIC7bStVyb44EpBps5SOIa5GrUPZwONy70=?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=042421) Our organizing efforts are starting now because we need to do everything we can to protect our House DFL Majority next year. There is so much on the line if Republicans get full control of the Minnesota Legislature: voting restrictions, discrimination bills, and so much more. We hope to continue to earn your support. **I am hoping to reach 30 fully refundable PCR donations by the end of the weekend** , would you be able to help us reach that goal? subject: Social Media Must Ban Violent Rightwing Extremists
body:

| **Social Media Must Ban Violent Rightwing Extremists**
FACEBOOK, TWITTER, YOUTUBE
The leading social media platforms - Facebook, Twitter, and Youtube - all played key roles in the Capitol insurrection on January 6, 2021. For far too long, these platforms have tolerated white supremacist and misogynistic groups like QAnon and the Proud Boys. Donald Trump used social media to summon and incite the mob that invaded the Capitol. Tell Facebook, Twitter and YouTube to permanently ban Donald Trump and all right-wing extremist accounts that are planning violent attacks and spreading dangerous lies. [ADD YOUR NAME](http://votedem.org/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100165905.546436.388&gen=1&mailing_linkid=18801) . We really appreciate your participation in this petition, as we expand our efforts to**identify every Democratic voter in the US to make sure they vote for Democrats in every election.** If you'd like to help us organize, [please join our Facebook community](http://votedem.org/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100165905.546436.388&gen=1&mailing_linkid=18802). Thanks for all you do! | ****| **Bob Fertik, President**

name: Nick Freitas
subject: Why You've Been Lied To About "Hard Work"
body:
| | | |
---
| | |
---
| | Why You've Been Lied To About "Hard Work" | Ep. #10

| | |

| | Have we all been told a lie about "Hard Work"?

Karl Marx and the "[labor theory of value](https://thewhyminutes.lt.acemlnc.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZ5b3V0dS5iZSUyRkFWNHlUZ1BDSEhn&a=224895143&account=thewhyminutes%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=fb85a853c097cf55e33d2ed095a03b77&i=15A46A15A110)" suggest that it is the difficulty or quantity of one's work that gives it value. But is that true, and are we inadvertently encouraging an incorrect view of the nature of "hard work"?

[In this episode of "The Why Minutes,"](https://thewhyminutes.lt.acemlnc.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZ5b3V0dS5iZSUyRlVTSkxlX1hUaWRV&a=224895143&account=thewhyminutes%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=fb85a853c097cf55e33d2ed095a03b77&i=15A46A15A108) we discuss how "hard work" may be a necessary component of achieving economic success, but it is not a sufficient one.

For Liberty and Faith,

Nick Freitas
Host, The Why Minutes

Karl Marx and the "" suggest that it is the difficulty or quantity of one's work that gives it value. But is that true, and are we inadvertently encouraging an incorrect view of the nature of "hard work"? we discuss how "hard work" may be a necessary component of achieving economic success, but it is not a sufficient one. name: Senator Chris Van Hollen
subject: SPECIAL ALERT: Join Me Monday for a Telephone Town Hall
body:
| This Monday, April 26, 2021, at 6:30 p.m., I'm hosting a Telephone Town Hall to answer your questions and provide an update on the American Rescue Plan and how it's helping Marylanders.6:30 p.m., I'm hosting a Telephone Town Hall to answer On the call, I'll share the latest in our ongoing battle against COVID-19 and discuss some of the initiatives I'm pursuing in Congress to advance Maryland's priorities, including President Biden's proposed American Jobs Plan and legislation to tackle climate change, gun safety, school funding, criminal justice reform, and voting rights.

You can sign up to join the call by clicking [here](vanhollen.senate.gov/live), or stream it live by going to [vanhollen.senate.gov/live](vanhollen.senate.gov/live). I hope you're able to join us Monday!

Chris Van Hollen
---

Hey there, Friend. It's Carter with Team Young. In case you haven't heard, House Democrats announced Young Kim's seat as a TOP TARGET, meaning they're zeroing in on her district and planning a slew of attacks to persuade voters against her. **But, I 'm here to get ahead of their lies, tell you the facts, and let you know EXACTLY who Young Kim is and what she stands for. Check it out:** | **YOUNG KIM IS:**
* Wife
* Mother
* Proud conservative
* Small business owner
* Immigrant
* One of the first Korean-
American women ever
elected to Congress

| **

YOUNG KIM STANDS FOR:**
* Lower taxes
* Fewer regulations
* Creating jobs
* Supporting small businesses
* Affordable healthcare
* Reopening our schools
* Strong immigration system
* Make the American
Dream possible for
ALL Americans

---|---
Young Kim is an example of the American Dream. Now, as one of the first Korean-American women ever elected to Congress, she fights daily for common sense solutions that will make the same opportunities possible for ALL Americans. It's our duty to protect her seat in Congress so she can keep up the fight for us.
Simply put, we NEED Young Kim in Congress. But to lead a winning campaign against the Democrats, we need resources to protect her seat. Which is why I'm coming to you now.

clean_body: Republicans and Democrats haven't always agreed on how our country should be run or who should run it, but there was ALWAYS a shared respect for the Constitution and rule of law that guarantees our freedoms. " These attempts to take over our nation's highest court will shake the foundations of our system of government and fray the boundaries of separation of powers instilled in our Constitution." | == == == Republicans and Democrats haven't always agreed on how our country should be run or who should run it, but there was ALWAYS a shared respect for the Constitution and rule of law that guarantees our freedoms. With this new era of radical Democrat leadership, this is sadly no longer the case. For well over a century, our nation's highest court has been fair and balanced with 9 Supreme Court Justices. Today's Democrat Party is HELL-BENT on rewriting the rules to tip the scales of justice in their favor. == == We have to act fast to stop the Democrats from charging ahead with their assault on the Supreme. == == == == Thank you, Thomas, NVAF Rapid Response Team == == == ** | Contributions to National Victory Action Fund are not deductible as charitable donations for federal income tax purposes. body:
The Green New Deal is a debacle- the Democrats need to be stopped!

| | | | | [](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Fnew-hampshire-gop%2Fstop-the-green-new-deal/1/01000179040b4f2c-0d97fa2a-351c-4bc5-81bf-f71f138a3b1a-000000/e3V-Pc8vLjCWQ0qjaJ3tQwvu2zk=211)

| | Derek,

The Green New Deal is a disaster. In a long list of the Democrats’ bad ideas, it may be their worst one yet.

---
[](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Fnew-hampshire-gop%2Fstop-the-green-new-deal/2/01000179040b4f2c-0d97fa2a-351c-4bc5-81bf-f71f138a3b1a-000000/EXVLDjJtEZjGcDfBg6bYSTUvRYQ=211)

| Democrats want to destroy the US economy, sacrifice energy independence, and leave 10 million Americans jobless just so they can push an ineffective and irrational climate agenda.

The Green New Deal would come at the cost of **$600,000 for EACH American household**. name: Governor Kim Reynolds
subject: I will always protect our 2A rights, Friend!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Kim Reynolds for Iowa Committee
body:
Last Friday, I signed legislation into law that protects the 2nd Amendment rights of Iowa's law-abiding citizens.

[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001qjLhxmnW6_mw_rHT6m4_HUTK2V016qQWGNj4LI5_93UKl_e6LJ1fkPXUzAZoJmvh0GJjyRjsC2GlLVNv3ooghAgQXWh42QQoo_YRXzfFblB0ryIdvivRxtDIXi8J8OZEVSa-0Fn6ruzjetKpV55mUpf3siq93PVSLm96319PAl5Tw8iWSbahFG3R2d6VrxrbxIeNg5Su6J3YOEWeoRfGkjyZ3_LanjHBM9JeX05xRHneSyK79XaD0Vco3moJAQHlRXlyPEkTIKyqI5ALAZNp1ri3-Nyxw7zfk4fHNcQ7-d5hrCDEOjkgRZmcDOIbfYs_KVV3u08yAuOhhbC-uTAqC6n9d1Gv7F14pU5gnpBPMAKUdO4ur3H-QisujW2PCiWa1YDsHmZ1x8tJP7pMQuOrC4FKbj_G8TxLF5GruFsONlyS9uONux3zuRoMuCrxI9cu1QL7Ew1JcGsJ3iszg7v7hX53pQnFPGPiRjrnarOvRto=&c=eSSu6nHJ0Wgt6NPB0QwqndS9QjEj0xThHGds064UvYrYFsC4Djv9PQ==&ch=5dmN2Z_db-5quBxYE-m1RsfuM-U-raU1I2cH-wTN1pDwBzQ0qWcI5w==)
Friend,
Last Friday, I signed legislation into law that protects the 2nd Amendment rights of Iowa's law-abiding citizens. Now the Left is attacking me for it and is outright misleading Iowans about this legislation.
Meanwhile, we have seen Joe Biden quickly turn to Executive Orders that could potentially limit your constitutional rights!

[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001qjLhxmnW6_mw_rHT6m4_HUTK2V016qQWGNj4LI5_93UKl_e6LJ1fkPXUzAZoJmvh0GJjyRjsC2GlLVNv3ooghAgQXWh42QQoo_YRXzfFblB0ryIdvivRxtDIXi8J8OZEVSa-0Fn6ruzjetKpV55mUpf3siq93PVSLm96319PAl5Tw8iWSbahFG3R2d6VrxrbxIeNg5Su6J3YOEWeoRfGkjyZ3_LanjHBM9JeX05xRHneSyK79XaD0Vco3moJAQHlRXlyPEkTIKyqI5ALAZNp1ri3-Nyxw7zfk4fHNcQ7-d5hrCDEOjkgRZmcDOIbfYs_KVV3u08yAuOhhbC-uTAqC6n9d1Gv7F14pU5gnpBPMAKUdO4ur3H-QisujW2PCiWa1YDsHmZ1x8tJP7pMQuOrC4FKbj_G8TxLF5GruFsONlyS9uONux3zuRoMuCrxI9cu1QL7Ew1JcGsJ3iszg7v7hX53pQnFPGPiRjrnarOvRto=&c=eSSu6nHJ0Wgt6NPB0QwqndS9QjEj0xThHGds064UvYrYFsC4Djv9PQ==&ch=5dmN2Z_db-5quBxYE-m1RsfuM-U-raU1I2cH-wTN1pDwBzQ0qWcI5w==)
-Politico
In Iowa, we recognize that law-abiding Iowans have a constitutional right to defend themselves. This legislation also incentivizes gun owners to register to get a permit and we are taking greater steps to inform law enforcement about individuals who should not carry a firearm.
Friend, I am committed to doing everything I can to protect our Second Amendment rights and adhere to the U.S. Constitution. But now, I need your help.

What is the Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC)?
The Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC) isn't just another alphabet soup political committee. We're the largest caucus of Republican state leaders in the nation with one unified goal: winning. Through innovative strategies and record-breaking support across all 50 states, we recruit, train, and support Republicans to state offices. Following a historically successful 2020 election cycle, state Republicans currently hold 62 of 99 state legislative chambers, 25 of 45 lieutenant governor seats, 28 of 50 secretary of state offices, and 11 of 12 independently-elected agriculture officials -- thanks in large part to the support from patriots like you. disclaimer_text: Paid for by Faulconer for Governor 2022
body:
We’re READY for commonsense leadership in California. Are you? Read more >>
Peter, We are gearing up for a BIG summer of voter outreach, and we need your help to reach as many California voters as possible. We are moving full steam ahead on organizing our grassroots team of volunteers to get out the vote for Kevin Faulconer later this year. There is a lot of work to be done in a short amount of time. It is critical that we come together and support Kevin, a proven leader, and finally vote Gavin Newsom OUT of office. We need every ounce of support we can get to make sure that every California voter knows there is a better way than what’s happening right now. **Please RUSH your best gift now to support our grassroots volunteers, and get ready for a California Comeback!** [**Fund our Voter Outreach >**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/897c0b44d041acd6/e7140e954d839611c3d6b838967d376c/34943) Help us get Gavin Newsom OUT of office, and get someone IN with a proven record of leadership in California. name: Team Maggie
subject: Maggie Hassan needs your help
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
Hi -- Senator Hassan emailed you a few days ago, and her message is really important. [**We've included a snippet below but if you're short on time, please click here to donate to her campaign and protect the Senate majority.**](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc8dc/2a380d31/2670a7d1/f070de/1878245265/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX2dlbmVyYWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDIxMDQyNF9oZWxwX1JPIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjMsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCJ9/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_general?refcode=e20210424_help_RO&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")
_The minute I announced my campaign, I knew it would be a tough fight ahead. Dark money and Republican special interest groups poured millions of dollars into New Hampshire in 2016 to try and beat me -- and they almost succeeded. When the dust settled, I won by just 1,017 votes._
_Now, with Democrats holding a razor-thin Senate majority, Republicans are doing whatever they can to win this seat. The Koch network and Mitch McConnell 's super PAC are already spending big on attack ads in New Hampshire, and election experts are saying this seat is one of the most likely to flip to the GOP._
Look, we're REALLY behind on our April fundraising goal. **In a race this close, falling behind even once could mean losing this seat.**
[**We need to raise $25,000 by tomorrow at midnight to close the gap, and Maggie is relying on your donation to get there. Will you please donate $3 or as much as you can right now?**](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc8dc/2a380d31/2670a7d1/f070de/1878245265/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX2dlbmVyYWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDIxMDQyNF9oZWxwX1JPIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjMsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCJ9/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_general?refcode=e20210424_help_RO&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")
Maggie first ran for office to advocate for families and kids who weren't getting the support they needed. And that's the spirit we need you to embrace today by standing with Maggie ahead of our crucial deadline.
[**$3 or anything you can give will go a long way so if you can, please donate now to keep this seat -- and the Senate -- in Democratic hands.**](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc8dc/2a380d31/2670a7d1/f070de/1878245265/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX2dlbmVyYWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDIxMDQyNF9oZWxwX1JPIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjMsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCJ9/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_general?refcode=e20210424_help_RO&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")
Thank you for helping!
> [Contribute](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc8dc/2a380d31/2670a7d1/f070de/1878245265/VEsC/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX2dlbmVyYWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDIxMDQyNF9oZWxwX1JPIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjMsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCJ9/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_general?refcode=e20210424_help_RO&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")

subject: Stand up to Big Tech by joining President Trump’s social platform!

body:
We're just around the corner from the launch of President Trump's very own social media platform and President Trump is taking on Big Tech the best way he knows how, UNAPOLOGETICALLY.

_****_
**NEWS: PRESIDENT TRUMP TO LAUNCH HIS OWN SOCIAL MEDIA PLATFORM**

We're just around the corner from the launch of President Trump's very own social media platform and President Trump is taking on Big Tech the best way he knows how--**unapologetically.**[**Pledge to join President Trump 's platform and stand up to Big Tech!**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001fHZh6bhnnDsiNDlcCPaJ7hA_YSOTHKyUzTpvo_ihvU8VWpfUVdJrozfPzq_ZJLc3jozdAz8UEEMj5AhFNIgV0CtRx8WVfVGMuy3I6i-t3xw2VboTpkngs7--7WP-LhuNNd6YcH7t4AF3FUfagac4-IXVghedW31ioxAmjT9eGQsgp9pkkk9YFDLPsvl10qHsqwn09uJnqJ9-0nT5Dni3fdYWnhxZMpeESnjkY3pAY0I3EF5QqAfyXuYUYl2ya891iZhTWtAs3SgzW5O-czdQKpBvhGY1M7bGzEOEKfTjLS4HGml7fxF4JgcUD8DTAGdeYtSs8GaIOB4W2hU5s3h04lGyh6L1JqizaJx3m_HfsniPcVemfPQff57Q4YzjLInokd2fzmpJtY46s7df-kYknQbo2yNydrTApQB0LBQLZcGn70xPVg3DcogCrkQzK83QFCKgY2UL4IsMwIBnlTRy_kHeV53k6wcPrXbkvUL1FJ2MOCLr8DY666WjUCPiYF-Z&c=ze-y5lkjVRIZV3j2MYWjAAnOhNLYvRrDx5wBUucKcXYMGrzLAJjSBQ==&ch=X6y204u1q_wsB9koWO4G57vjm89LpNlYRlmKcgD3Eg8Z2CE5qoBw3A==)

But Big Tech won't give up so easily--as they continue to censure conservatives.

[**Can we count on you to join us?**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00178l4_zHPhWPvX6lwcQyVZ5B8QnARPeqGZDhckkabeyWxVB0A5L3QIUBD5Sah_TvxnZ3nPN7azN2xkOvcPwirY92F3XUmOJ8T1lkd2xEzYo7WKze75B0WYEti8zu16ganQbVZ501Yq5u53VUWynsROeR-_A25YxD_IjFAkzK5Yg2rIJj_a7kheq8jjuQhP97FXQSdYYL9OurgmP261fLgleWPoffyOdQsGpHVp5VksX6GxKZVpwb0mrAxxWwvfw2yEubyYrPHq-m-bo76Ll70XLcNbZCr4WU8Sv3KmlPX4iNhrIYKEtNftcSK0elFjgGhfxWb-pia3Mn_PwIzrVSi-lM5L4zmsJiuEgx--Nki6GGn34BzSo7MgGLYFHEjcvLxwWwZgZQr1p3KGLd6Xp0RgPblCGeIjZT6LevipNdG7OuTwC39brOOuKJ6dQP2gK-m7tutS4aT_0_u-6dkXl7jETXxvCu0jtJ8aQnsnQrinTzt-5xS2w5dTQ==&c=iBnW64JJsRb0wSCG5VngS1tAJDcJlkSmDKNFyCg4stSRxiKxsB2gNQ==&ch=yNv8wqiKvganYH9nuWKhwbxHf1OQ5BIS6XZrInze97gVB1zMMs372Q==)

Mark, House GOP HQ

\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: **Taylor** , House GOP HQ
Date: Wed, Apr 21, 2021 at 12:27 PM
Subject: Have you heard from our Fellow Conservative?
To: **Mark** , House GOP HQ

Hey Mark,

It's nearly the end of April, and I haven't heard from our Fellow Conservative about their House Victory Coalition member status.

[**We 're asking only the most valued members of our team to join.**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00178l4_zHPhWPvX6lwcQyVZ5B8QnARPeqGZDhckkabeyWxVB0A5L3QIUBD5Sah_TvxnZ3nPN7azN2xkOvcPwirY92F3XUmOJ8T1lkd2xEzYo7WKze75B0WYEti8zu16ganQbVZ501Yq5u53VUWynsROeR-_A25YxD_IjFAkzK5Yg2rIJj_a7kheq8jjuQhP97FXQSdYYL9OurgmP261fLgleWPoffyOdQsGpHVp5VksX6GxKZVpwb0mrAxxWwvfw2yEubyYrPHq-m-bo76Ll70XLcNbZCr4WU8Sv3KmlPX4iNhrIYKEtNftcSK0elFjgGhfxWb-pia3Mn_PwIzrVSi-lM5L4zmsJiuEgx--Nki6GGn34BzSo7MgGLYFHEjcvLxwWwZgZQr1p3KGLd6Xp0RgPblCGeIjZT6LevipNdG7OuTwC39brOOuKJ6dQP2gK-m7tutS4aT_0_u-6dkXl7jETXxvCu0jtJ8aQnsnQrinTzt-5xS2w5dTQ==&c=iBnW64JJsRb0wSCG5VngS1tAJDcJlkSmDKNFyCg4stSRxiKxsB2gNQ==&ch=yNv8wqiKvganYH9nuWKhwbxHf1OQ5BIS6XZrInze97gVB1zMMs372Q==)

They're a top-tier patriot and a dedicated conservative... I thought they'd be all over this, **especially because our ability to take back the House and defend Trump 's legacy hinges on the support of people like them.** But, as I said, their name was missing from the list.

We're just FIVE SEATS away from taking back the House and firing Pelosi. That's the SMALLEST the majority has been in decades. If we miss this shot to restore an America First agenda... we might not get another like it again!

We're finalizing the list of PLATINUM patriots at midnight, so if they want to join this exclusive coalition of dedicated conservatives, they have to at fast.

[_**There 's not much time left. Our fellow Conservative has only until 11:59 PM tonight to join the ranks of PLATINUM patriots. Would you mind reaching out to remind them?**_](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00178l4_zHPhWPvX6lwcQyVZ5B8QnARPeqGZDhckkabeyWxVB0A5L3QIUBD5Sah_TvxnZ3nPN7azN2xkOvcPwirY92F3XUmOJ8T1lkd2xEzYo7WKze75B0WYEti8zu16ganQbVZ501Yq5u53VUWynsROeR-_A25YxD_IjFAkzK5Yg2rIJj_a7kheq8jjuQhP97FXQSdYYL9OurgmP261fLgleWPoffyOdQsGpHVp5VksX6GxKZVpwb0mrAxxWwvfw2yEubyYrPHq-m-bo76Ll70XLcNbZCr4WU8Sv3KmlPX4iNhrIYKEtNftcSK0elFjgGhfxWb-pia3Mn_PwIzrVSi-lM5L4zmsJiuEgx--Nki6GGn34BzSo7MgGLYFHEjcvLxwWwZgZQr1p3KGLd6Xp0RgPblCGeIjZT6LevipNdG7OuTwC39brOOuKJ6dQP2gK-m7tutS4aT_0_u-6dkXl7jETXxvCu0jtJ8aQnsnQrinTzt-5xS2w5dTQ==&c=iBnW64JJsRb0wSCG5VngS1tAJDcJlkSmDKNFyCg4stSRxiKxsB2gNQ==&ch=yNv8wqiKvganYH9nuWKhwbxHf1OQ5BIS6XZrInze97gVB1zMMs372Q==)

name: Tim Scott
subject: My family's story is being fact-checked?!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SCOTT FOR SENATE
body:
The mainstream has decided to fact-check my family's story of "cotton to Congress in one lifetime." That's right, The Washington Post has been investigating my family's history in the South and downplaying the struggles and racism they faced.

Visit here to [unsubscribe](http://ct4.americasnewsletter.com/t/9469598/224717773/2036/2/?90482085=aHR0cDovL2N0NC5hbWVyaWNhc25ld3NsZXR0ZXIuY29tL3U%2faWQ9MjI0NzE3NzczLjhkZjc4NzE1ODQwOGE3NzA4OTMwYWNmMTRjZjJjYTljJm49VCZsPWEtbWFzdGVybGlzdF9yaWdodC1wYXRoXzEwMTQ5OSZvPTk0Njk1OTg%3d&x=7e177bc9).

Friend,

The mainstream media has decided to fact-check my family's story of "cotton to Congress in one lifetime."

That's right, The Washington Post has been investigating my family's history in the South and downplaying the struggles and racism they faced.

**It's shameful. Plain and simple.**

I am used to being attacked for daring to think differently, for daring to be a proud black conservative, and for daring to publicly stand up for what I believe.

But this latest attack from the mainstream media represents a new low -- even for them.

We should never allow this type of casual racism to go unanswered -- **I hope you agree we can do better.**

[STAND WITH ME](http://ct4.americasnewsletter.com/t/9469598/224717773/198727/3/?ff2f3d13=cnAuMTAxNDk5&ff2f3d13=cnAuMTAxNDk5&x=0d8b2225)
---

Let me explain. My family's journey is a complicated one, records weren't kept, and family history was passed down from generation to generation through storytelling.

But no amount of "fact-checking" or attacks from the mainstream media will EVER take away from the struggles that my family overcame.

My grandfather grew up a poor South Carolina cotton farmer in the Great Depression. Yet he lived long enough to see his grandson become the first African American elected to both the U.S. House and Senate.

He lived long enough to see his wildest dreams become a reality. From cotton to Congress in one lifetime!

We have to call out this casual racism against black Republicans when we see it. It's shameful and we cannot allow it to go unnoticed.

[STAND WITH ME](http://ct4.americasnewsletter.com/t/9469598/224717773/198727/4/?ff2f3d13=cnAuMTAxNDk5&ff2f3d13=cnAuMTAxNDk5&x=649bbef0)
---

I wake up every single day working to ensure that future generations have the same opportunities that I did to succeed.

Every time I see a nasty insult from the Left or an unjust "fact-check," I am comforted knowing that there are patriots like you, friend, who have my back.

Sadly, this won't be the last time we face insults, casual racism, or attacks from the Left. [**But with your help we can continue spreading the positive message of conservatism.**](http://ct4.americasnewsletter.com/t/9469598/224717773/198728/5/?ff2f3d13=cnAuMTAxNDk5&ff2f3d13=cnAuMTAxNDk5&x=aaed9b02)

[STAND WITH ME](http://ct4.americasnewsletter.com/t/9469598/224717773/198727/6/?ff2f3d13=cnAuMTAxNDk5&ff2f3d13=cnAuMTAxNDk5&x=a3ac4a0b)
---

Artis Ware's Proud Grandson,

Senator Tim Scott

PAID FOR BY TIM SCOTT FOR SENATE
---

1405 ASHLEY RIVER ROAD
CHARLESTON, SC 29407

[Privacy Policy](http://ct4.americasnewsletter.com/t/9469598/224717773/17144/7/)

body:
The most powerful and dangerous bureaucrat in American history. | | | | |
---

---
| | | |
---
| | | | Peter:

I was one of the first lawmakers in Congress to speak out against Dr. Anthony Fauci's lockdown recommendations.

I could see the damage done to our country and was shocked when Dr. Fauci called the shutdown policy merely "inconvenient" after over 17 million Americans had lost their jobs.

One year later, Dr. Fauci continues to move the goalposts and push lockdowns, even for those who have immunity.

Americans need to take action to elect principled conservatives who will stand up to the liberal elites who want to use COVID-19 to take away our individual liberties.

[**You can start by supporting the House Freedom Fund and these three outstanding candidates with a split contribution:**](https://HouseFreedomFund.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=aefad1d6b0163789c70b59bf1&id=99b62a48b4&e=b2c16e6198)

✅ U.S. Rep. Lauren Boebert (R-CO)
✅ U.S. Rep. Yvette Herrell (R-NM)
✅ U.S. Rep. Scott Perry (R-PA)

The House Freedom Fund will pay all processing fees, so these candidates receive 100% of your donation.

**They will also send you a copy of the new bestselling book, _"Faucian Bargain: The Most Powerful and Dangerous Bureaucrat in American History,"_ if you give $25 or more.**

Public health officials, like Dr. Fauci and the mainstream media, have exacerbated the COVID-19 epidemic. Their fear-mongering rhetoric and lockdown policies have proven to be worse than the virus.

We need to fight for conservative leadership in Washington and make sure Americans have the facts so they can reclaim their freedom.

[**Please join me in supporting conservative candidates and get your copy of bestselling _Faucian Bargain_!**](https://HouseFreedomFund.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=aefad1d6b0163789c70b59bf1&id=b9e6d9fb35&e=b2c16e6198)

Thank you for considering this important request and for doing so much to help fight for America's future.

Sincerely,
---
|

U.S. Congressman, R-Arizona

name: Team AOC
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
Alexandria’s focus will always be on supporting our community and delivering results for working families across the country.
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20210424-2024-header&t=1&akid=2024%2E2526796%2ECjhOLN)
**Alexandria is one of the most heavily targeted Democrats in Congress.** Right-wing outlets like Fox News spend countless hours trying to stoke outrage about her policy agenda. Last cycle, Republicans spent more than $10 million trying to kick her out of Congress.
We can expect Alexandria’s 2022 race to be another massive and expensive fight, so we need to do everything we can _right now_ to prepare. We rely on grassroots support — no corporate handouts or big money — from people like you who believe in the world AOC fights for every day.
But to be honest, we could really use a strong boost of grassroots support today to ensure we don’t fall too far behind our fundraising goals.
[If you’re able, please make your first $3 contribution today to help us close our fundraising gap and ensure we have the resources to keep Alexandria in Congress fighting for working families.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/8618?refcode=em20210424-2024&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=2024%2E2526796%2ECjhOLN)
**[Contribute $3](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/8618?refcode=em20210424-2024&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=2024%2E2526796%2ECjhOLN)**
Last week, we shared how we hadn’t been focused on fundraising for our campaign lately — instead we had poured much of our energy and resources into supporting local groups and other efforts. And, that’s important! Alexandria’s focus will always be on supporting our community and delivering results for working families across the country.
But, because of that, we’re still trying to close a gap in our campaign fundraising, and that’s why we really could use your help today.
[**If you are able, can you chip in $3 right now to help us close this gap in our fundraising and allow Alexandria to stay focused on delivering policies and solutions that lift up working families?**](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/8618?refcode=em20210424-2024&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&akid=2024%2E2526796%2ECjhOLN)
Thank you,
Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ocasio-campaign?refcode=em20210424-2024-footer&t=24&refcode2=2024_2526796_CjhOLN&akid=2024%2E2526796%2ECjhOLN)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=25&akid=2024%2E2526796%2ECjhOLN) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=26&akid=2024%2E2526796%2ECjhOLN) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=27&akid=2024%2E2526796%2ECjhOLN)
Email us: [us@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: us@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)

name: Sarah Huckabee Sanders
subject: VP Harris is failing at the border
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sarah for Governor |
body:
Tens of thousands of immigrants in massive caravans are now flooding our southern border and setting records: more individuals than in the last 20... **ALERT: President Biden put VP Harris in charge of the border crisis weeks ago and she STILL hasn’t visited! ** _This inaction is unacceptable. If you agree, chip in now to fight the Biden-Harris Administration’s ineffective immigration policies._ [**DONATE: $25**](http://links.shsforgov.com/u/click?_t=1a739425fcea4563aabd0234355111c0&_m=d2205e9ec9414496b8cacf7d2f106c6c&_e=GAUoRDsmb_s4xmo867Wfx_sLxT-U3txR6QpqcasWYjBmrdVXvQ5_JIWYoNZnmqUA7uqKZnCf9cWdcGMje9MndtJE6IsQFCK64vYtutypclYUK9VsJX-Ai1SBUmFsjr2MmKfpqe0k476VIy6mo9sXhj5GS6mvx-blpYcqT5guNnO3HzmMU_kjhQ0Udt7yglz4wS4s43gYyn1ALcpaRmjDcD50P38jRjcB5-cQwL206G_sB3d-ok_rFnXilux-Eg7pB3T63nVnjjOEZ9_4mfyB4wd2z9dHewMGZDVd4ckUZKBuowRM4esSnb_nxM8b1pxyM-W8e9zKeqvADRKX-GwrK4h8_fo7MSLoFYRQXfFmgUHNYdxaYSf5xApxjWFK7Qq0LN_e7yo0HeBru89DxCQB3FFH-aV7Oba6FWsofmtecruw0dSl0IBC1h1BWv621nMOLx5fI_v80a779zHAiDNcJqO5egp86cV3_GJreAVCtK0%3D) [](http://links.shsforgov.com/u/click?_t=1a739425fcea4563aabd0234355111c0&_m=d2205e9ec9414496b8cacf7d2f106c6c&_e=GAUoRDsmb_s4xmo867Wfx_sLxT-U3txR6QpqcasWYjBmrdVXvQ5_JIWYoNZnmqUA7uqKZnCf9cWdcGMje9MndtJE6IsQFCK64vYtutypclYUK9VsJX-Ai1SBUmFsjr2MmKfpqe0k476VIy6mo9sXhj5GS6mvx-blpYcqT5guNnO3HzmMU_kjhQ0Udt7yglz4wS4s43gYyn1ALcpaRmjDcD50P38jRjcB5-cQwL206G_sB3d-ok_rFnXilux-Eg7pB3T63nVnjjOEZ9_4mfyB48Bt15OumRCfVUofg2VwTpSK6F7D1OzPXL9gttyagd1kLVF-5h8Wzgr4V99wNl6XzW3C2_O543TbjRpbSjbdVQjhz367svLU-Bo8c2Z_mf4PaTlOWcRXS_lKGt3ClzofF8hLZvUYgnxrG4sJBfCr5K-pww1pUp_2YdYAk7kgdlMK5eydD1uMYx2F_DjrlmQDO1Fkp1g97Qug54JTFgnI_5o%3D) Peter, it only took a few months for the Biden-Harris administration to completely dismantle the border policies President Trump put in place. _And the results are disastrous._ Tens of thousands of immigrants in massive caravans are now flooding our southern border and setting records: more individuals than in the last 20 years! President Biden put Kamala Harris in charge of the crisis, but she’s missing in action - she hasn’t visited the border. And anytime the press dares to ask a question about it, she avoids them! It’s inexcusable and this dangerous inaction is exactly what I intend to fight as Governor. If the Democrats are allowed to pack the Supreme Court, this will permanently END President Trump’s Supreme Court Majority. That would mean that they can enact all of their CRAZY voter ID laws, FOREVER changing the course of our elections, and PREVENT us from fighting back against the Democrats as they control the House, Senate, and White House! We need to protect the Supreme Court at all costs before all of our American values are destroyed! All gifts made before 11:59 pm will be 6X MATCHED: Everything is on the line. It all comes down to this. Thank you, Supreme Court Alert (via House Conservatives Fund) Founded in 1997, the House Conservatives Fund (HCF) has been the political arm of the Republican Study Committee (RSC), the largest caucus of conservatives in Congress. For more than two decades, HCF has been pursuing its mission of electing and retaining members who are committed to our core conservative principles. HCF’s current roster of 140 members understands that our mission has never been more urgent than it is today. House Conservatives Fund . name: Team Erica Smith
subject: re: $838,092.00 cash on hand
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Erica Smith for US Senate 2022
body:
"Cash on hand" is perhaps the single-most important indicator of a campaign’s success.
#
Earlier this month we emailed you about Jeff Jackson — our moderate, white primary opponent who's aligned with the Democratic establishment.
Unfortunately (according to the most recent FEC data published last week), he outraised us in quarter 1 by _a lot_. [**_Make a donation of $5 or more right now to help close the gap._**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/191?refcode=em20210424-49&t=1&akid=49%2E3698%2EIHME3a)
Jeff Jackson's cash on hand: **$838,092.00.**
Erica Smith's cash on hand: **$93,372.72.**
Total difference: **$744,719.28.**
"Cash on hand" is how much money a campaign actually has left in the bank — **and is perhaps the single most important indicator of a campaign's success.**
So if there's any chance of building a winning campaign to challenge the Democratic establishment and deliver for working families, we MUST increase our campaign's cash on hand as much as possible — starting right now at the beginning of quarter 2.
[**_With all of this in mind, will you help Erica Smith for U.S. Senate expand our cash on hand by making a donation of $5 or more today? We must raise as much cash on hand as possible in order to grow our scrappy, insurgent moral movement for North Carolina._**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/191?refcode=em20210424-49&t=20&akid=49%2E3698%2EIHME3a)
**[Donate »](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/191?refcode=em20210424-49&t=21&akid=49%2E3698%2EIHME3a)**
In solidarity,
Team Erica Smith for U.S. Senate

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-emails?refcode=em20210424-49-footer&t=22&refcode2=49_3698_IHME3a&akid=49%2E3698%2EIHME3a)**
---
Email us: [info@ericaforus.com](mailto: info@ericaforus.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Grassroots donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Erica for Us, P.O. Box 1236, Gaston, NC 27832.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=23&akid=49%2E3698%2EIHME3a)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ericaforus.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=24&akid=49%2E3698%2EIHME3a)

Paid for by Erica Smith for US Senate 2022

I'm fighting to keep burdens low on our taxpayers, supporting our oil and gas industry, and working with small businesses to help them survive during a difficult time. **It 's time we take a stand and fight back! * * *
April 24, 2021
## Dear Friend,
This has been another wild week ... and another week of wilding.
* "Nobel-prize nominee" Stacey Abrams made media headlines [with the bizarre claim](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=452a4fe7de&e=ad8cba7e98) that voter ID leads to police violence.
* We filed a new round of responses in our lawsuit against Abrams' group Fair Fight _(Fair Fight sued us claiming voter suppression over elector challenges in Georgia,_[_we then countersued Fair Fight_](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=1a7d8d03a5&e=ad8cba7e98) _on behalf of Georgia voters who endured Abrams-led harassment for asserting their right_[ _to participate in elector challenges_](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=f78e46b200&e=ad8cba7e98) _)_.
* The Maricopa County AZ election audit started, stopped, and started again _[(check out our live stream of the audit)](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=4bf63e684c&e=ad8cba7e98). _
* Hundreds of CEOs and celebrities [doubled-down on doublethink](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=62f7a54e87&e=ad8cba7e98) with new election propaganda _(lying that the need for election integrity is based on a lie)_.
* We continued development of new tools and training to empower voters and partner organizations - yay Team True the Vote!
* I spent several days talking with and preparing materials for law enforcement to further ongoing investigations based on information we've uncovered _(not yet made public because it would undermine active efforts)._
* And, as has been the case for months now, we painfully watched as others make election claims that we cannot, we will not, support, knowing that it will all play out in due course.

Yes, American election-drama has become a bizarre reality show. Which brings me to the point of my message...it's time to unplug. Maybe you already have, and if so, I'm glad to hear it. But if you haven't, as a friend I'm telling you, unplug lest you burn out. Don't get burned out. There is too much work to be done in the days ahead. We face very real problems in our elections. Vote trafficking is organized and happening nationwide. Foreign countries have been given unfettered access to confidential election information and control operations in ways we can prove and will soon reveal. And the common denominator of the corruption, at the core of every grift, are voter rolls riddled with bad records. That's what we're working on now, all of it and more. Through the noise of frivolous lawsuits, hyperbolic claims, and political pettiness ... there are real, provable crimes that will be exposed. A trickle of indictments have started (in Arizona) but it takes time - and will continue to take time, longer than we would like, but necessary to get all the facts straight. What you can do right now is help support election integrity legislation in your state. Check out info below on how to engage. In the next few months there will be new projects we'd like to work with you on. And I give you my word, we will reveal corruption the likes of which you've never seen. Right now is not the time for headlines, but that time is coming and when it does we will publish it here first. There will be more wild weeks ahead. Keep your bearings. We're all in this together. And working together, we the people, only we the people, can true the vote. We can. **Ever onward -** _PS. You are stronger than you know. You are here for such a time. Keep the faith._
---

# For The Record
_From True the Vote's Courtney Kramer _ Despite the continuous corporate caterwauling about new election laws many [CEOs](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=83b9e8025b&e=ad8cba7e98) clearly have not read, solid election bills continue to be drafted and passed coast to coast. 2020 battleground states have shown that they will not step down as we continue to see somewhat sweeping election reform. Though corporate CEOs have decided to add “politics” to their job description, every week new legislation continues to surface. Let’s take a look at Arizona. Arizona passed two bills in the last two months that will hopefully rid the state of the misfortunes that occurred in November. Following [Gov. Ducey](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=56582e11f1&e=ad8cba7e98) signing into law a bill that will remove the ability of private money to influence elections, the Maricopa County audit is now underway. Relatedly, Arizona GOP state Sen. [Kelly Townsend](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=d71a8f58bb&e=ad8cba7e98) recently voted “no” on Senate Bill 1485 that would stop voters from automatically being mailed absentee ballots explaining that she wants to first see the results of the audit, which includes a hand recount of 2.1 million ballots. This surprising vote does make the fate of the election bill uncertain as there is another barrier in the way of this legislation. Not shockingly, Arizona Dems [filed suit](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=59bd6f973a&e=ad8cba7e98) against the Maricopa County Board of Supervisors on Thursday to stop the audit alleging that the audit is led by “[partisan contractors hired by the Republican-controlled Senate”](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=786bb706c5&e=ad8cba7e98) and cited concerns about transparency. Keep in mind that[ the audit](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=f37e6d6da3&e=ad8cba7e98) will be live-streamed until it is concluded. A hearing on this matter took place Friday afternoon to determine the outcome of the TRO and preliminary injunction. The audit was temporarily [halted](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=65f41f6088&e=ad8cba7e98) after Maricopa Superior Court Judge Christopher Coury ruled that the audit must stop until Monday at noon in order to inspect procedures in place and determine if auditors are operating legally. Ironically enough, Arizona Democrats did not want to pay the $1 million bond to cover the costs of any potential wrongful delays and now the audit is back on. Though the very concerns the democrats raised here is on par with the same level of concern raised in November 2020 across the country, it is encouraging to finally see people on all sides of the political sphere taking a stance on protecting the integrity of our election processes and recognizing that transparency is of the utmost importance. The GA Sec. of State Brad Raffensperger has thrown similar roadblocks into [Fulton County’s ballot inspection](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=fe3d70b1ac&e=ad8cba7e98). Raffensperger does not want the physical ballots being audited but only wants the digital images of the ballots to be inspected. In the interest of justice, one would think that both of these audits would be in everyone’s best interest and that total transparency and integrity in this process should be standard. Despite these current legal battles still tied up in the courts, one thing is clear. These voting laws are accomplishing a universal purpose–making it harder to cheat and easier to vote. These bills are far from racist, and they are not discriminatory. For the record, if you consider protecting the integrity of each legal vote “discriminatory” then it might be time for a history lesson on discrimination. We applaud state legislatures across the country in their election reform efforts and encourage more to follow."
---

# Legislative Updates
We're excited to be working with so many groups who are ready and willing to help support Election Integrity efforts, specifically those that are playing out right now in states across the country. Case in point - [**AMAC Action**](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=4589988fcd&e=ad8cba7e98)!

Since Monday, AMAC Action has been engaging their advocates in Texas in support of House Bill 6, the Election Integrity Protection Act of 2021. So far, _**over 500 emails**_ have been sent to members of the Texas House by AMAC members to encourage support for the bill. These efforts even helped in gaining a new co-sponsor for H.B. 6! AMAC Action continues to push this great initiative. _**If you're a Texas resident, check out AMAC Action and join with hundreds of thousands of Texans who are speaking out in defense of fair and accurate elections in Texas! Do it today! Time is of the essence!**_ [****](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=ad24ed6bdd&e=ad8cba7e98)
---
| |
# Take Action

Does your local or state party have an election integrity task force?
Find out whether your local or state party has a task force focused on securing the integrity of the next election. Our state by state database has all the information you need to find out who to contact in your town, precinct, county, or state. And once you're in touch, get involved in the process. You can help out, volunteer, or even just offer your support for their effort, to keep them on the right track.

Click on your state using our interactive map to find out what's happening where you vote!

# MUST READS

**Fact vs. Myth on 'Voter Suppression' Legislation**
_Ilya Shapiro, Washington Examiner_ \- Sorting out fact from fiction is not only important for this particular law, the fallout from which has already reached Major League Baseball and some Hollywood productions, but to understand the general debate over election regulation in America.
[Read the rest](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=1a249863d5&e=ad8cba7e98)

**Vermont Secretary of State to Conduct 2020 Election Audit**
_From Associated Press_ \- Every ballot cast and every race in the seven randomly selected communities will be included in the audit. The communities selected for this year’s audit are Brandon, Pownal, Randolph, South Burlington, Topsham, Warren and Worcester.
[Read the rest](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=33169079e7&e=ad8cba7e98)

**Alabama Senate Delays Vote on Curbside Voting Ban**
_From ABC News, Birmingham_ \- The Alabama Senate delayed a vote in the face of a Democratic filibuster. No Alabama counties are known to have used curbside voting in the last election, but groups have sought the authorization of the method
[Read the rest](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=b3217010d9&e=ad8cba7e98)

**Raffensperger Claims Democrats Barred Him From Testifying During Election Integrity Hearing**
_From Washington Examiner_ \- Georgia Secretary of State Brad Raffensperger claimed that Democrats barred him from testifying in front of the Senate Judiciary Committee during their hearing on election integrity. Republicans invited Raffensperger to testify during Tuesday's hearing “Jim Crow 2021: The Latest Assault on the Right to Vote," but the effort was blocked, the Republican secretary of state claimed in a statement. He named Georgia Sen. Jon Ossoff, who won in runoff elections Jan. 5, and didn't name any other senator.
[Read the rest](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=b0e1b5fe96&e=ad8cba7e98)

clean_body: | | | | | | | April 24, 2021 Dear Friend, This has been another wild week ... and another week of wilding. "Nobel-prize nominee" Stacey Abrams made media headlines that voter ID leads to police violence. We filed a new round of responses in our lawsuit against Abrams' group Fair Fight (Fair Fight sued us claiming voter suppression over elector challenges in Georgia, on behalf of Georgia voters who endured Abrams-led harassment for asserting their right ). The Maricopa County AZ election audit started, stopped, and started again . Hundreds of CEOs and celebrities with new election propaganda (lying that the need for election integrity is based on a lie). We continued development of new tools and training to empower voters and partner organizations - yay Team True the Vote! I spent several days talking with and preparing materials for law enforcement to further ongoing investigations based on information we've uncovered (not yet made public because it would undermine active efforts). And, as has been the case for months now, we painfully watched as others make election claims that we cannot, we will not, support, knowing that it will all play out in due course. Yes, American election-drama has become a bizarre reality show. Which brings me to the point of my message...it's time to unplug. Maybe you already have, and if so, I'm glad to hear it. But if you haven't, as a friend I'm telling you, unplug lest you burn out. Don't get burned out. There is too much work to be done in the days ahead. We face very real problems in our elections. Vote trafficking is organized and happening nationwide. Foreign countries have been given unfettered access to confidential election information and control operations in ways we can prove and will soon reveal. And the common denominator of the corruption, at the core of every grift, are voter rolls riddled with bad records. That's what we're working on now, all of it and more. Through the noise of frivolous lawsuits, hyperbolic claims, and political pettiness ... there are real, provable crimes that will be exposed. A trickle of indictments have started (in Arizona) but it takes time - and will continue to take time, longer than we would like, but necessary to get all the facts straight. What you can do right now is help support election integrity legislation in your state. Check out info below on how to engage. In the next few months there will be new projects we'd like to work with you on. And I give you my word, we will reveal corruption the likes of which you've never seen. Right now is not the time for headlines, but that time is coming and when it does we will publish it here first. There will be more wild weeks ahead. Keep your bearings. We're all in this together. And working together, we the people, only we the people, can true the vote. We can. Ever onward - PS. You are stronger than you know. You are here for such a time. Keep the faith. | "DONATE TO TRUE THE VOTE" | | For The Record From True the Vote's Courtney Kramer Despite the continuous corporate caterwauling about new election laws many clearly have not read, solid election bills continue to be drafted and passed coast to coast. 2020 battleground states have shown that they will not step down as we continue to see somewhat sweeping election reform. Though corporate CEOs have decided to add “politics” to their job description, every week new legislation continues to surface. Let’s take a look at Arizona. Arizona passed two bills in the last two months that will hopefully rid the state of the misfortunes that occurred in November. Following signing into law a bill that will remove the ability of private money to influence elections, the Maricopa County audit is now underway. Relatedly, Arizona GOP state Sen. recently voted “no” on Senate Bill 1485 that would stop voters from automatically being mailed absentee ballots explaining that she wants to first see the results of the audit, which includes a hand recount of 2.1 million ballots. This surprising vote does make the fate of the election bill uncertain as there is another barrier in the way of this legislation. Not shockingly, Arizona Dems against the Maricopa County Board of Supervisors on Thursday to stop the audit alleging that the audit is led by “ and cited concerns about transparency. Keep in mind that will be live-streamed until it is concluded. A hearing on this matter took place Friday afternoon to determine the outcome of the TRO and preliminary injunction. The audit was temporarily after Maricopa Superior Court Judge Christopher Coury ruled that the audit must stop until Monday at noon in order to inspect procedures in place and determine if auditors are operating legally. Ironically enough, Arizona Democrats did not want to pay the $1 million bond to cover the costs of any potential wrongful delays and now the audit is back on. Though the very concerns the democrats raised here is on par with the same level of concern raised in November 2020 across the country, it is encouraging to finally see people on all sides of the political sphere taking a stance on protecting the integrity of our election processes and recognizing that transparency is of the utmost importance. The GA Sec. of State Brad Raffensperger has thrown similar roadblocks into . Raffensperger does not want the physical ballots being audited but only wants the digital images of the ballots to be inspected. In the interest of justice, one would think that both of these audits would be in everyone’s best interest and that total transparency and integrity in this process should be standard. Despite these current legal battles still tied up in the courts, one thing is clear. These voting laws are accomplishing a universal purpose–making it harder to cheat and easier to vote. These bills are far from racist, and they are not discriminatory. For the record, if you consider protecting the integrity of each legal vote “discriminatory” then it might be time for a history lesson on discrimination. We applaud state legislatures across the country in their election reform efforts and encourage more to follow." | Legislative Updates We're excited to be working with so many groups who are ready and willing to help support Election Integrity efforts, specifically those that are playing out right now in states across the country. Case in point - ! Since Monday, AMAC Action has been engaging their advocates in Texas in support of House Bill 6, the Election Integrity Protection Act of 2021. So far, over 500 emails have been sent to members of the Texas House by AMAC members to encourage support for the bill. These efforts even helped in gaining a new co-sponsor for H.B. 6! AMAC Action continues to push this great initiative. If you're a Texas resident, check out AMAC Action and join with hundreds of thousands of Texans who are speaking out in defense of fair and accurate elections in Texas! Do it today! Time is of the essence! | | Take Action Does your local or state party have an election integrity task force? Find out whether your local or state party has a task force focused on securing the integrity of the next election. Our state by state database has all the information you need to find out who to contact in your town, precinct, county, or state. And once you're in touch, get involved in the process. You can help out, volunteer, or even just offer your support for their effort, to keep them on the right track. Click on your state using our interactive map to find out what's happening where you vote! | MUST READS Fact vs. Myth on 'Voter Suppression' Legislation Ilya Shapiro, Washington Examiner \- Sorting out fact from fiction is not only important for this particular law, the fallout from which has already reached Major League Baseball and some Hollywood productions, but to understand the general debate over election regulation in America. Vermont Secretary of State to Conduct 2020 Election Audit From Associated Press \- Every ballot cast and every race in the seven randomly selected communities will be included in the audit. The communities selected for this year’s audit are Brandon, Pownal, Randolph, South Burlington, Topsham, Warren and Worcester. Alabama Senate Delays Vote on Curbside Voting Ban From ABC News, Birmingham \- The Alabama Senate delayed a vote in the face of a Democratic filibuster. No Alabama counties are known to have used curbside voting in the last election, but groups have sought the authorization of the method Raffensperger Claims Democrats Barred Him From Testifying During Election Integrity Hearing From Washington Examiner \- Georgia Secretary of State Brad Raffensperger claimed that Democrats barred him from testifying in front of the Senate Judiciary Committee during their hearing on election integrity. Republicans invited Raffensperger to testify during Tuesday's hearing “Jim Crow 2021: The Latest Assault on the Right to Vote," but the effort was blocked, the Republican secretary of state claimed in a statement. He named Georgia Sen. Jon Ossoff, who won in runoff elections Jan. 5, and didn't name any other senator. | | "Goodness is about character- integrity, honesty, kindness, generosity, moral courage and the like. More than anything else it is about how we treat other people." - Dennis Prager Check Us Out On Insta! @ Want to see Election Integrity convos served up a whole new way? Check us out on Instagram and Facebook and let us know what you think! | "I SUPPORT ELECTION INTEGRITY " | | | | Copyright © 2021 True the Vote, All rights reserved.
